# Core Packages

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providermigrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Public Migration Status](../public-migration-status.md)

Core provider-neutral packages moved before concrete provider adapters.

These rows are migration evidence, not permission to move adjacent SaaS, task DB, project, or infra responsibilities into C4.

| RIID | Public package | Migration status |
| --- | --- | --- |
| RIID-4652 | internal/agentbridge/toolargs, internal/agentbridge/toolpolicy | bounded/redacted ToolRef.Args, C7 risk surface, AutoApprover, ToolStartGate |
| RIID-4653 | internal/agentbridge/session | one-run session actor, parser/driver/reducer stream, timeout, cancellation, telemetry, fail-closed gate |
| RIID-4654 | internal/agentbridge/bridge, internal/agentbridge/detectutil | provider registry, detect/run entrypoint, PATH lookup, env override pin, version probe |
| RIID-4656 | internal/agentbridge/runtimeactor | mailbox actor, detect, capability reconciliation, bounded slots, submit/cancel/status/heartbeat |
| RIID-4657 | internal/agentbridge/controlplane | provider-neutral source/reporter port for registration, heartbeat, claim, cancel-watch, events |

Facts:

- Provider-native hook/RPC pre-start interrupt and SaaS/web approval handoff are executed by later session/runtimeactor/provider adapter slices, not by the early tool policy slice alone.
- Still outside these moves: supervisor polling loop, controlplane/saasplane, controlplane/taskdbplane, concrete provider adapters, server HTTP/SSE transport, task DB, project, and MWSD adapters.

Evidence artifacts:

- internal/agentbridge/toolargs
- internal/agentbridge/toolpolicy
- internal/agentbridge/session
- internal/agentbridge/bridge
- internal/agentbridge/detectutil
- internal/agentbridge/runtimeactor
- internal/agentbridge/controlplane
